hero.imageAlt: A seamless craftsman home addition mid-build, framing precisely matched to the existing roofline and siding profile
hero.badge: Bainbridge Island · North Seattle · Licensed GC · Est. 2018
hero.headline: One Crew. One Contact. No Surprises.

intro.label: A design-build studio, not a bid mill
intro.body: A design-build remodeling studio serving Bainbridge Island and the north Seattle neighborhoods. We pull every permit, carry our own licensed crews, and manage the project from design through final inspection — no subcontractor chaos, no surprises.

personas.label: Kitchen & Bath Remodel
personas.kicker: For the heart of your home

personas.label: Whole-Home Renovation
personas.kicker: For the home you're ready to invest in

configuratorTeaser.headline: Get a project budget range in under a minute.
configuratorTeaser.body: Tell us your project type and size and we'll return a transparent estimate range before any consultation.

zPatternRows.label: Permit Management
zPatternRows.headline: You never have to call the city. That's our job.
zPatternRows.body: Every project that requires a permit gets one. We handle the application, coordinate with engineers when required, schedule inspections, and get the final stamp. That permit protects your home insurance, your resale value, and the structure itself.

zPatternRows.label: Single Crew
zPatternRows.headline: One project manager. One point of contact.
zPatternRows.body: No juggling six subcontractors who don't talk to each other. We coordinate every trade in-house or through long-term partners who know our standards. You make one call — we handle everything behind it.

zPatternRows.label: Scope First
zPatternRows.headline: A detailed written scope before a single dollar is spent.
zPatternRows.body: No round-number guesses. Every project starts with a site visit, a line-item cost breakdown, and a realistic timeline. If the scope changes during build, you're notified in writing before the change happens — not surprised at closeout.

zPatternRows.label: The Warranty
zPatternRows.headline: Two years of workmanship, no asterisks.
zPatternRows.body: Every project carries a two-year workmanship warranty. Active after the final walk-through, covers the work we did — not the materials, not the manufacturer. If it's our work, it's our warranty.

footerCta.headline: Ready to build something that'll last?
footerCta.subhead: We'll be in touch within a few hours to schedule a walkthrough.
